name: Mix-n-Match Skillet Meals
recipeIngredient: BREADS & CEREALS (1 cup raw): Macaroni, Spaghetti, Rice (white or brown), Noodles, Bulgar, Any pasta
SAUCE (1 can soup plus 1 1/2 cans milk, broth, or water):
PROTEIN (1 pound or 1 1/2 cups cooked): Chopped beef, Chopped pork or ham, Ground beef or turkey, Chicken, Turkey, Tuna, Salmon, Mackerel, Cooked dry beans, Frankfurters, Keilbasa
VEGETABLES (1 1/2 to 2 cups canned, cooked, or raw):
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose one food from each of the four groups above.
2. Stir together in a skillet.
3. Season to taste with salt, pepper, soy sauce, onion flakes, garlic, or whatever spices you enjoy.
4. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to the lowest setting and cover the pan. Let it simmer for 30 minutes until pasta or rice is tender. Stir occasionally to prevent rice and pasta from sticking.
6. If desired, stir in cheese.
7. Serve. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
To Bake in Oven:
1. Mix all ingredients in a casserole dish and cover tightly.
2. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
